site.name: Turjubaan Kheyraad
site.defaultDescription: Dukumentiyada Resource Translator GitHub Action — turjumaad machine oo otomaatig ah oo faylasha kheyraadka ah iyada oo loo marayo Azure AI Translator.

header.languageDescription: U beddel isla boggaas luqad kale.
header.languageNoResults: Luqado ma jiraan oo la mid ah filter-kaas.

search.title: Dukumentiyada raadinta
search.idleHelp: Ka hel maqaallada iyadoo la adeegsanayo mowduuc, qaabka faylka, ikhtiyaarka habeynta, ama cunto karinta. Isticmaal {up} {down} si aad u hagto, {enter} furto.
search.empty: Natiijo ma jirto. Isku day eray kale oo muhiim ah.
search.error: Search index laguma heli karo horumarinta. Dhis wax soo saar.

footer.taglinePrefix: GitHub Action si toos ah u turjumaya faylasha kheyraadkaaga, oo lagu dhisay dusha rasmiga ah
footer.copyrightPrefix: Waxaa lagu sii daayay hoos yimaada
